content.thinking: Let me start by understanding the project structure and the real app's runtime environment before writing any Storybook configuration or stories.

input.prompt:
Very thorough exploration of this project. I need to understand:

1. Project structure - what's in src/, what frameworks/libraries are used
2. The entry point (main.tsx or index.tsx) - full provider tree
3. App.tsx - routing, layout, providers
4. All providers/contexts used
5. All CSS/style imports at root level
6. All hooks that fetch data (look for fetch, axios, useSWR, useQuery, etc.)
7. All browser state reads (localStorage, sessionStorage, cookies)
8. All portal usage (createPortal, portal roots in index.html)
9. Pages and top-level components
10. Existing tests that show component usage patterns
11. package.json dependencies
12. Any existing Storybook config in .storybook/

Read the actual file contents, don't just list files. Start with package.json, then main/index entry, then App.tsx, then follow all imports deeply.

1→import { StrictMode } from 'react'
     2→import { createRoot } from 'react-dom/client'
     3→
     4→import App from './App'
     5→import * as serviceWorker from './serviceWorker'
     6→
     7→const container = document.querySelector('#root') as HTMLElement
     8→const root = createRoot(container)
     9→
    10→root.render(
    11→  <StrictMode>
    12→    <App />
    13→  </StrictMode>
    14→)
    15→
    16→// If you want your app to work offline and load faster, you can change
    17→// unregister() to register() below. Note this comes with some pitfalls.
    18→// Learn more about service workers: https://bit.ly/CRA-PWA
    19→serviceWorker.unregister()
    20→

1→import useDarkMode from 'use-dark-mode'
     2→import { ThemeProvider } from 'styled-components'
     3→import { BrowserRouter as Router } from 'react-router-dom'
     4→import { Provider as StoreProvider } from 'react-redux'
     5→
     6→import { store } from './app-state'
     7→import { AppRoutes } from './Routes'
     8→import { lightTheme, darkTheme } from './styles/theme'
     9→import { GlobalStyle } from './styles/GlobalStyle'
    10→
    11→export default function App() {
    12→  const { value } = useDarkMode(false, { global: globalThis.window })
    13→  const theme = value ? darkTheme : lightTheme
    14→
    15→  return (
    16→    <Router>
    17→      <StoreProvider store={store}>
    18→        <ThemeProvider theme={theme}>
    19→          <GlobalStyle />
    20→          <AppRoutes />
    21→        </ThemeProvider>
    22→      </StoreProvider>
    23→    </Router>
    24→  )
    25→}
    26→

1→import { useLayoutEffect } from 'react'
     2→import { Routes, Route, useLocation } from 'react-router-dom'
     3→
     4→import { CategoryListPage } from './pages/CategoryListPage'
     5→import { CategoryDetailPage } from './pages/CategoryDetailPage'
     6→import { RestaurantDetailPage } from './pages/RestaurantDetailPage'
     7→import { HomePage } from './pages/HomePage'
     8→import { CheckoutPage } from './pages/CheckoutPage'
     9→import { SuccessPage } from './pages/SuccessPage'
    10→
    11→export const AppRoutes: React.FC<React.PropsWithChildren<unknown>> = ({ children }) => {
    12→  const location = useLocation()
    13→  // Scroll to top when a path changes
    14→  useLayoutEffect(() => {
    15→    window.scrollTo(0, 0)
    16→  }, [location.pathname])
    17→
    18→  return (
    19→    <>
    20→      <div id="modal" />
    21→      <Routes>
    22→        <Route path="/categories" element={<CategoryListPage />} />
    23→        <Route path="/categories/:id" element={<CategoryDetailPage />} />
    24→        <Route path="/restaurants/:id" element={<RestaurantDetailPage />} />
    25→        <Route path="/checkout" element={<CheckoutPage />} />
    26→        <Route path="/success" element={<SuccessPage />} />
    27→        <Route path="/" element={<HomePage />} />
    28→        {children}
    29→      </Routes>
    30→    </>
    31→  )
    32→}
    33→

1→import { combineReducers, configureStore } from '@reduxjs/toolkit'
     2→
     3→import { reducer as cart } from './cart'
     4→import { reducer as order } from './order'

     6→export const rootReducer = combineReducers({

     8→  order,
     9→})
    10→
    11→export const store = configureStore({

    15→export type AppDispatch = typeof store.dispatch

1→import { TypedUseSelectorHook, useDispatch, useSelector } from 'react-redux'
     2→
     3→import { AppDispatch, RootState } from './store'
     4→
     5→/**
     6→ * The reason we expose our own dispatch and selector
     7→ * is that we get typescript safety anywhere, which is
     8→ * automatically updated as we add more slices to the application.

    10→
    11→export const useAppDispatch = () => useDispatch<AppDispatch>()

1→import { useCallback, useEffect, useState } from 'react'
     2→
     3→import type { Restaurant } from '../types'
     4→
     5→import { api } from './index'
     6→
     7→export const useFetchRestaurants = () => {
     8→  const [status, setStatus] = useState('idle')
     9→  const [restaurants, setRestaurants] = useState<Restaurant[]>([])
    10→  const [retry, setRetry] = useState(false)
    11→
    12→  const retryRequest = useCallback(() => {
    13→    setRetry((prev) => !prev)
    14→  }, [setRetry])
    15→
    16→  useEffect(() => {
    17→    setStatus('loading')
    18→
    19→    api
    20→      .getRestaurants()
    21→      .then((res) => {
    22→        setStatus('success')
    23→        setRestaurants(res)
    24→      })
    25→      .catch((error) => {
    26→        const statusCode = error?.response?.status || 500
    27→        setStatus(statusCode.toString())
    28→      })
    29→  }, [retry])
    30→
    31→  return {
    32→    status,
    33→    restaurants,
    34→    retryRequest,
    35→  }
    36→}
    37→
    38→export const useFetchRestaurantsByCategory = (categoryId?: string) => {
    39→  const [status, setStatus] = useState('idle')
    40→  const [restaurants, setRestaurants] = useState<Restaurant[]>([])
    41→  const [retry, setRetry] = useState(false)
    42→
    43→  const retryRequest = useCallback(() => {
    44→    setRetry((prev) => !prev)
    45→  }, [setRetry])
    46→
    47→  useEffect(() => {
    48→    if (categoryId) {
    49→      setStatus('loading')
    50→
    51→      api
    52→        .getRestaurantsByCategory(categoryId)
    53→        .then((res) => {
    54→          setStatus('success')
    55→          setRestaurants(res)
    56→        })
    57→        .catch((error) => {
    58→          const statusCode = error?.response?.status || 500
    59→          setStatus(statusCode.toString())
    60→        })
    61→    }
    62→  }, [categoryId, retry])
    63→
    64→  return {
    65→    status,
    66→    restaurants,
    67→    retryRequest,
    68→  }
    69→}
    70→
    71→export const useFetchRestaurant = (id: string) => {
    72→  const [status, setStatus] = useState('idle')
    73→  const [restaurant, setRestaurant] = useState<Restaurant>()
    74→  const [retry, setRetry] = useState(false)
    75→
    76→  const retryRequest = useCallback(() => {
    77→    setRetry((prev) => !prev)
    78→  }, [setRetry])
    79→
    80→  useEffect(() => {
    81→    setStatus('loading')
    82→
    83→    api
    84→      .getRestaurantById(id)
    85→      .then((res) => {
    86→        setStatus('success')
    87→        setRestaurant(res)
    88→      })
    89→      .catch((error) => {
    90→        const statusCode = error?.response?.status || 500
    91→        setStatus(statusCode.toString())
    92→      })
    93→  }, [id, retry])
    94→
    95→  return {
    96→    status,
    97→    restaurant,
    98→    retryRequest,
    99→  }
   100→}
   101→

1→import { useCallback, useEffect, useState } from 'react'
     2→
     3→export const useKey = (key: string, keyDownCb = () => {}, keyUpCb = () => {}): boolean => {
     4→  const [pressed, setPressed] = useState(false)
     5→  const match = useCallback((event: any) => key.toLowerCase() === event.key.toLowerCase(), [key])
     6→
     7→  const onKeyDown = useCallback(
     8→    (event: KeyboardEvent) => {
     9→      if (match(event)) {
    10→        setPressed(true)
    11→        keyDownCb()
    12→      }
    13→    },
    14→    [keyDownCb, match]
    15→  )
    16→
    17→  const onKeyUp = useCallback(
    18→    (event: KeyboardEvent) => {
    19→      if (match(event)) {
    20→        setPressed(false)
    21→        keyUpCb()
    22→      }
    23→    },
    24→    [keyUpCb, match]
    25→  )
    26→
    27→  useEffect(() => {
    28→    globalThis.addEventListener('keydown', onKeyDown)
    29→    globalThis.addEventListener('keyup', onKeyUp)
    30→
    31→    return () => {
    32→      globalThis.removeEventListener('keydown', onKeyDown)
    33→      globalThis.removeEventListener('keyup', onKeyUp)
    34→    }
    35→  }, [key, onKeyDown, onKeyUp])
    36→
    37→  return pressed
    38→}
    39→

    11→type ModalProps = {
    12→  isOpen: boolean
    13→  onClose: () => void
    14→}
    15→
    16→export const Modal: React.FC<React.PropsWithChildren<ModalProps>> = ({
    17→  children,
    18→  isOpen,
    19→  onClose,
    20→}) => {
    21→  useKey('escape', onClose)
    22→  useLockBodyScroll(isOpen)
    23→  const contentRef = React.useRef(null)

    25→
    26→  return (
    27→    <Portal selector="#modal">
    28→      <CSSTransition
    29→        in={isOpen}
    30→        timeout={300}
    31→        classNames="modal"
    32→        unmountOnExit
    33→        nodeRef={contentRef}
    34→      >
    35→        <ModalContent data-testid="modal" ref={contentRef}>
    36→          <TopBar>
    37→            <Button
    38→              data-testid="modal-close-btn"
    39→              onClick={onClose}
    40→              clear
    41→              round
    42→              icon="cross"
    43→              aria-label="close modal"
    44→              iconSize={16}
    45→            />
    46→          </TopBar>
    47→          {children}
    48→        </ModalContent>
    49→      </CSSTransition>
    50→
    51→      <CSSTransition
    52→        in={isOpen}
    53→        timeout={300}
    54→        classNames="backdrop"
    55→        unmountOnExit
    56→        nodeRef={backdropRef}
    57→      >
    58→        <Backdrop data-testid="modal-backdrop" ref={backdropRef} onClick={onClose} />
    59→      </CSSTransition>
    60→    </Portal>
    61→  )
    62→}

content.text:
Perfect! I have gathered comprehensive information about the project. Let me compile the thorough exploration report. ## Comprehensive Project Exploration Report ### 1. PROJECT STRUCTURE & OVERVIEW This is a **React 19 + TypeScript** food delivery web app called **"Mealdrop"** built with: - **Build tool**: Vite 6.2.0 - **Testing**: Vitest 4.0.15 with Storybook addon-vitest + Playwright - **Package manager**: Yarn 4.2.1 - **State management**: Redux Toolkit 2.6.0 - **Routing**: React Router DOM 7.2.0 - **Styling**: Styled Components 6.1.15 - **Form validation**: Zod 3.24.2 + React Hook Form 7.54.2 - **HTTP client**: Axios 1.8.1 - **Theme toggle**: use-dark-mode 2.3.1 Entry point: `/src/index.tsx` → renders `` into `#root` portal ### 2. ENTRY POINT & PROVIDER TREE (`src/index.tsx`) ``` StrictMode └─ App ``` ### 3. APP.TSX - FULL PROVIDER TREE ``` Router (BrowserRouter) └─ StoreProvider (Redux) └─ ThemeProvider (styled-components) ├─ GlobalStyle (CSS reset + fonts + theme transitions) └─ AppRoutes (routing) ``` **Key providers:** - Redux store with cart and order slices - Dark/light theme via `useDarkMode` hook (checks `globalThis.window`) - Styled-components theme with light/dark variants ### 4. ROUTING (`src/Routes.tsx`) Routes defined: - `/` → HomePage - `/categories` → CategoryListPage - `/categories/:id` → CategoryDetailPage - `/restaurants/:id` → RestaurantDetailPage - `/checkout` → CheckoutPage - `/success` → SuccessPage Scroll-to-top behavior on route changes via `useLayoutEffect` ### 5. REDUX STATE MANAGEMENT (`src/app-state/`) **Store structure:** - `cart` slice: `{ visible: boolean, items: CartItem[] }` - `order` slice: `{ items: CartItem[] }` **Cart actions:** - `toggleVisibilityAction()` - `saveItemAction(item)` - add/update item with quantity - `removeItemAction(item)` - decrease quantity or remove - `clearItemAction(item)` - remove item completely - `clearCartAction()` - clear all items + hide cart **Selectors (via `createSelector`):** - `selectCartVisibility` - `selectCartItems` - `selectCartItemsCount` - `selectCartTotal` **Custom hooks:** - `useAppDispatch()` - typed dispatch - `useAppSelector()` - typed selector ### 6. CSS & STYLES (`src/styles/`) **GlobalStyle.tsx** imports: - `react-multi-carousel/lib/styles.css` - `react-loading-skeleton/dist/skeleton.css` - Custom @font-face declarations (Montserrat, Hind) - CSS reset + transitions (250ms ease-in for theme switching) - `.container`, `.container-desktop` utility classes **Theme** (light/dark modes): - Color palette: baseColors (white, black, red, grey, green, blue) - Spacing scale: xxs-xxl (0.25em to 5.25em) - Border radius: xs-xxl + round - Box shadows: card, inner, outerBorder - Typography: fontSize (body, heading1-4), fontWeight (regular-black) - Both light and dark theme objects exported ### 7. DATA FETCHING HOOKS (`src/api/hooks.ts`) **3 custom hooks** using axios: - `useFetchRestaurants()` - returns `{ status, restaurants[], retryRequest }` - `useFetchRestaurantsByCategory(categoryId)` - conditional fetch - `useFetchRestaurant(id)` - single restaurant All return state: `'idle'`, `'loading'`, `'success'`, or error status code (e.g., `'404'`, `'500'`) **API layer** (`src/api/index.ts`): - Caching mechanism (Map-based, disabled in test/Storybook environments) - Environment detection: `import.meta.env.STORYBOOK`, `NODE_ENV === 'test'` - Conditional logic: Uses `MockedRestaurantsApi` in test/Storybook, `RestaurantsApi` otherwise - Mock data: `restaurantsCompleteData` from `/src/stub/restaurants` ### 8. BROWSER STATE READS **No localStorage/sessionStorage usage detected** Browser state reads only: - `globalThis.window` - for dark mode detection - `document.body.style.overflow` - body scroll lock (in `useLockBodyScroll`) - `globalThis.navigator.userAgent` - mobile detection (in `isMobile()`) - `window.scrollTo(0, 0)` - scroll to top on route change ### 9. PORTAL USAGE **Portal roots in `index.html`:** ```html
``` **Portal component** (`src/components/Portal.tsx`): ```typescript createPortal(children, element) ``` Used in: - Modal component - portals content to `#modal` - Triggered when Modal's `isOpen` prop is true ### 10. CUSTOM HOOKS (`src/hooks/`) - `useKey(key, keyDownCb, keyUpCb)` - keyboard event listener hook - Used in Modal to detect ESC key for closing - Global event listeners with cleanup - `useLockBodyScroll(shouldLock)` - prevents body scrolling - Sets `document.body.style.overflow` - On mobile, also sets `document.body.style.height = '100vh'` ### 11. PAGES & TOP-LEVEL COMPONENTS **Pages** (`src/pages/`): 1. **HomePage** - sections: Banner, RestaurantsSection, AwardWinningSection, CategoriesSection 2. **CategoryListPage** - displays category grid 3. **CategoryDetailPage** - restaurants filtered by category 4. **RestaurantDetailPage** - menu with food items 5. **CheckoutPage** - multi-step form + order summary 6. **SuccessPage** - order confirmation **Template** (`src/templates/PageTemplate.tsx`): - 3 variants: `'default'` (Header + Footer), `'sticky-header'` (sticky header), `'basic'` (logoOnly header, no footer) **Components** (26 total): - **Layout**: Header, Footer, PageTemplate, Sidebar - **UI**: Button, Badge, Icon, IconButton, Logo, Spinner, ErrorBlock, TopBanner - **Cards**: RestaurantCard, Category, FooterCard - **Forms**: Input, Select - **Complex**: Modal, ShoppingCart, ShoppingCartMenu, Breadcrumb - **Typography**: Heading, Body, PageSection - **Misc**: AnimatedIllustration, Review, Portal ### 12. KEY COMPONENT PATTERNS **Header** (`src/components/Header/Header.tsx`): - Container + presentational `HeaderComponent` - Connects to Redux: `selectCartVisibility`, `selectCartItems`, `selectCartTotal` - Dark mode toggle via `useDarkMode` - Navigation links, cart button, theme toggle **Button** (`src/components/Button/Button.tsx`): - Props: `clear`, `round`, `large`, `icon`, `iconSize`, `disabled` - Styled-components with theme access via `useTheme()` - Icon support via Icon component **Modal** (`src/components/Modal/Modal.tsx`): - Uses Portal with `#modal` selector - CSSTransition animations (300ms) - Escape key detection via `useKey()` - Body scroll lock via `useLockBodyScroll()` - Backdrop click to close **ShoppingCart Components**: - `ShoppingCartItem` - displays quantity, name, price - `OrderSummary` - displays cart items total - `ShoppingCartMenu` - sidebar modal with items **Forms**: - `Input` - controlled input with label, error display - `Select` - styled select element - `MultiStepForm` - 2-step form (ContactDetails, DeliveryDetails) - Validation via Zod schemas ### 13. TYPES & VALIDATION (`src/types/index.ts`) ```typescript ShopItem { id, name, price, imageUrl?, description? } FoodMenuItem { id, name, description?, price } Restaurant { name, id?, rating?, categories?, menu, photoUrl, isClosed?, isNew?, ... } ``` **Zod schemas** (`CheckoutPage/validation.ts`): - `contactDetailsSchema` - firstName, lastName, email, phone - `deliveryDetailsSchema` - address, city, postcode (regex: `^\d{4}[A-Z]{2}$`) ### 14. HELPERS & UTILITIES **`src/helpers/index.ts`:** - `toCurrency(number)` - formats with locale currency - `isMobile()` - checks userAgent for mobile **`src/api/conditional-logic.ts`:** - Detection for mocked vs real API - Sorts restaurants by isNew (desc) and isClosed (asc) ### 15. STORYBOOK CONFIG (`.storybook/`) **Main.ts:** - Stories pattern: `**/*.stories.@(js|jsx|mjs|ts|tsx)` + `**/*.mdx` - Addons: chromatic, vitest, a11y, docs, onboarding **Preview.tsx:** - Control matchers for color/date fields - a11y addon set to 'todo' **Tests:** - Only `.stories.ts*` files with vitest addon - Browser testing via Playwright (headless chromium) - Mobile viewport option (393×852) ### 16. PROJECT DEPENDENCIES SUMMARY **Key libraries:** - react 19.0.0, react-dom 19.0.0 - @reduxjs/toolkit 2.6.0, react-redux 9.2.0 - react-router-dom 7.2.0 - styled-components 6.1.15 - axios 1.8.1 (with caching) - react-hook-form 7.54.2, zod 3.24.2 - react-transition-group 4.4.5 - react-multi-carousel 2.8.5 - react-loading-skeleton 3.5.0 - use-dark-mode 2.3.1 **Build & Test:** - vite 6.2.0, vitest 4.0.15 - storybook (0.0.0-pr-34421) + chromatic - playwright 1.50.1, @vitest/browser-playwright 4.0.15 - msw 2.7.3 (mock service worker) ### 17. STUB DATA (`src/stub/`) - `categories.ts` - category list - `restaurants.ts` - mock restaurant data (complete with menus) - `cart-items.ts` - sample cart items This project uses stub data in test/Storybook environments and conditionally swaps between mock and real APIs. --- ## File Paths Reference **Key entry files:** - `/src/index.tsx` - React app entry - `/src/App.tsx` - Provider tree - `/src/Routes.tsx` - Route definitions - `index.html` - Portal roots (`#root`, `#modal`) **State management:** - `/src/app-state/store.ts` - Redux store config - `/src/app-state/cart/cart.ts` - cart slice - `/src/app-state/order/order.ts` - order slice - `/src/app-state/hooks.ts` - Redux hooks **Data fetching:** - `/src/api/index.ts` - API client with caching - `/src/api/hooks.ts` - Data fetching hooks - `/src/api/conditional-logic.ts` - Mock/real API switching **Styles:** - `/src/styles/GlobalStyle.tsx` - Global styles + font imports - `/src/styles/theme.ts` - Light/dark theme definitions - `/src/styles/CSSReset.ts` - CSS reset utilities - `/src/styles/breakpoints.ts` - Responsive breakpoints **Hooks:** - `/src/hooks/useKeyboard.ts` - `useKey()` hook - `/src/hooks/useBodyScrollLock.ts` - `useLockBodyScroll()` hook **Components:** 26 components in `/src/components/` **Pages:** 6 pages in `/src/pages/` **Configuration:** - `.storybook/main.ts` - Storybook config - `.storybook/preview.tsx` - Storybook preview - `vite.config.ts` - Vite config - `vitest.config.ts` - Vitest + browser testing config - `tsconfig.json` - TypeScript config - `package.json` - Dependencies and scripts

import useDarkMode from 'use-dark-mode'
import { ThemeProvider } from 'styled-components'
import { BrowserRouter as Router } from 'react-router-dom'
import { Provider as StoreProvider } from 'react-redux'

import { store } from './app-state'
import { AppRoutes } from './Routes'
import { lightTheme, darkTheme } from './styles/theme'
import { GlobalStyle } from './styles/GlobalStyle'

export default function App() {
  const { value } = useDarkMode(false, { global: globalThis.window })
  const theme = value ? darkTheme : lightTheme

  return (
    <Router>
      <StoreProvider store={store}>
        <ThemeProvider theme={theme}>
          <GlobalStyle />
          <AppRoutes />
        </ThemeProvider>
      </StoreProvider>
    </Router>
  )
}

     6→    '../src/**/*.stories.@(js|jsx|mjs|ts|tsx)',
     7→    './eval-support/*.mdx',
     8→  ],
     9→  addons: [
    10→    '@chromatic-com/storybook',
    11→    '@storybook/addon-vitest',
    12→    '@storybook/addon-a11y',
    13→    '@storybook/addon-docs',
    14→    '@storybook/addon-onboarding',
    15→  ],
    16→  framework: '@storybook/react-vite',
    17→};
    18→
    19→export default config;
    20→

1→import { useLayoutEffect } from 'react'
     2→import { Routes, Route, useLocation } from 'react-router-dom'
     3→
     4→import { CategoryListPage } from './pages/CategoryListPage'
     5→import { CategoryDetailPage } from './pages/CategoryDetailPage'
     6→import { RestaurantDetailPage } from './pages/RestaurantDetailPage'
     7→import { HomePage } from './pages/HomePage'
     8→import { CheckoutPage } from './pages/CheckoutPage'
     9→import { SuccessPage } from './pages/SuccessPage'
    10→
    11→export const AppRoutes: React.FC<React.PropsWithChildren<unknown>> = ({ children }) => {
    12→  const location = useLocation()
    13→  // Scroll to top when a path changes
    14→  useLayoutEffect(() => {
    15→    window.scrollTo(0, 0)
    16→  }, [location.pathname])
    17→
    18→  return (
    19→    <>
    20→      <div id="modal" />
    21→      <Routes>
    22→        <Route path="/categories" element={<CategoryListPage />} />
    23→        <Route path="/categories/:id" element={<CategoryDetailPage />} />
    24→        <Route path="/restaurants/:id" element={<RestaurantDetailPage />} />
    25→        <Route path="/checkout" element={<CheckoutPage />} />
    26→        <Route path="/success" element={<SuccessPage />} />
    27→        <Route path="/" element={<HomePage />} />
    28→        {children}
    29→      </Routes>
    30→    </>
    31→  )
    32→}
    33→

1→import { useCallback, useEffect, useState } from 'react'
     2→
     3→import type { Restaurant } from '../types'
     4→
     5→import { api } from './index'
     6→
     7→export const useFetchRestaurants = () => {
     8→  const [status, setStatus] = useState('idle')
     9→  const [restaurants, setRestaurants] = useState<Restaurant[]>([])
    10→  const [retry, setRetry] = useState(false)
    11→
    12→  const retryRequest = useCallback(() => {
    13→    setRetry((prev) => !prev)
    14→  }, [setRetry])
    15→
    16→  useEffect(() => {
    17→    setStatus('loading')
    18→
    19→    api
    20→      .getRestaurants()
    21→      .then((res) => {
    22→        setStatus('success')
    23→        setRestaurants(res)
    24→      })
    25→      .catch((error) => {
    26→        const statusCode = error?.response?.status || 500
    27→        setStatus(statusCode.toString())
    28→      })
    29→  }, [retry])
    30→
    31→  return {
    32→    status,
    33→    restaurants,
    34→    retryRequest,
    35→  }
    36→}
    37→
    38→export const useFetchRestaurantsByCategory = (categoryId?: string) => {
    39→  const [status, setStatus] = useState('idle')
    40→  const [restaurants, setRestaurants] = useState<Restaurant[]>([])
    41→  const [retry, setRetry] = useState(false)
    42→
    43→  const retryRequest = useCallback(() => {
    44→    setRetry((prev) => !prev)
    45→  }, [setRetry])
    46→
    47→  useEffect(() => {
    48→    if (categoryId) {
    49→      setStatus('loading')
    50→
    51→      api
    52→        .getRestaurantsByCategory(categoryId)
    53→        .then((res) => {
    54→          setStatus('success')
    55→          setRestaurants(res)
    56→        })
    57→        .catch((error) => {
    58→          const statusCode = error?.response?.status || 500
    59→          setStatus(statusCode.toString())
    60→        })
    61→    }
    62→  }, [categoryId, retry])
    63→
    64→  return {
    65→    status,
    66→    restaurants,
    67→    retryRequest,
    68→  }
    69→}
    70→
    71→export const useFetchRestaurant = (id: string) => {
    72→  const [status, setStatus] = useState('idle')
    73→  const [restaurant, setRestaurant] = useState<Restaurant>()
    74→  const [retry, setRetry] = useState(false)
    75→
    76→  const retryRequest = useCallback(() => {
    77→    setRetry((prev) => !prev)
    78→  }, [setRetry])
    79→
    80→  useEffect(() => {
    81→    setStatus('loading')
    82→
    83→    api
    84→      .getRestaurantById(id)
    85→      .then((res) => {
    86→        setStatus('success')
    87→        setRestaurant(res)
    88→      })
    89→      .catch((error) => {
    90→        const statusCode = error?.response?.status || 500
    91→        setStatus(statusCode.toString())
    92→      })
    93→  }, [id, retry])
    94→
    95→  return {
    96→    status,
    97→    restaurant,
    98→    retryRequest,
    99→  }
   100→}
   101→

import { DefaultTheme } from 'styled-components'

declare module 'styled-components' {
  export interface DefaultTheme {
    name: 'light' | 'dark'
    fonts: {
      family: string
    }
    spacing: typeof spacing
    color: typeof color
    borderRadius: typeof borderRadius
    boxShadow: typeof boxShadow
    typography: typeof typography
  }
}

const baseColors = {
  white: '#FFFFFF ',
  black: '#202020',
  red: {
    base: '#D70808',
    light1: '#E57373',
    light2: '#EF9A9A',
    dark1: '#C62828',
    dark2: '#B71C1C',
  },
  otherBlack: '#2C2C2C ',
  grey: {
    base: '#909090',
    light1: '#A6A6A6',
    light2: '#BCBCBC',
    light3: '#D2D2D2',
    light4: '#E9E9E9',
    light5: '#F5F6F7',
    light6: '#F9F9F9',
    dark1: '#797979',
    dark2: '#636363',
    dark3: '#4D4D4D',
    dark4: '#363636',
    dark5: '#2C2C2C',
    dark6: '#202020',
  },
  green: {
    base: '#E5F8BC',
    light1: '#E8F9C3',
    light2: '#EAF9C9',
    light3: '#EDFAD0',
    light4: '#EFFBD7',
    light5: '#F2FCDE',
    dark1: '#CEDFA9',
    dark2: '#B7C696',
    dark3: '#A0AE84',
    dark4: '#899571',
    dark5: '#737C5E',
  },
  blue: {
    base: '#B1DDE4',
    light1: '#B9E0E7',
    light2: '#C1E4E9',
    light3: '#C8E7EC',
    light4: '#D0EBEF',
    light5: '#D8EEF2',
    dark1: '#9FC7CD',
    dark2: '#8EB1B6',
    dark3: '#7C9BA0',
    dark4: '#6A8589',
    dark5: '#596f72',
  },
}

const spaceUnit = 1

const borderRadius = {
  xs: '4px',
  s: '8px',
  m: '16px',
  l: '24px',
  xl: '32px',
  xxl: '40px',
  round: '50%',
}

const spacing = {
  xxs: `${0.25 * spaceUnit}em`,
  xs: `${0.5 * spaceUnit}em`,
  s: `${spaceUnit}em`,
  m: `${1.25 * spaceUnit}em`,
  l: `${2 * spaceUnit}em`,
  xl: `${3.25 * spaceUnit}em`,
  xxl: `${5.25 * spaceUnit}em`,
}

const boxShadow = {
  card: '0px 14px 26px 0px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.08)',
  inner: 'inset 0 3px 0 0 rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.05)',
  outerBorder: `0 0 0 1px ${baseColors.blue.dark2}, 0 0 0 4px ${baseColors.blue.light5}`,
}

const typography = {
  fontSize: {
    body: '1.125rem',
    bodyS: '1rem',
    bodyXS: '0.9rem',
    bodyXXS: '0.72rem',
    heading1: '2.74rem',
    heading2: '2.19rem',
    heading3: '1.75rem',
    heading4: '1.4rem',
  },
  fontWeight: {
    black: '900',
    bold: '700',
    medium: '500',
    regular: '400',
  },
}

const color = {
  accentText: baseColors.black,
  badgeBackground: baseColors.grey.light4,
  badgeText: baseColors.grey.dark2,
  cartButtonText: baseColors.grey.base,
  bannerBackground: baseColors.blue.base,
  buttonClear: 'transparent',
  buttonClearHover: baseColors.grey.light5,
  buttonPrimary: baseColors.grey.dark6,
  buttonPrimaryHover: baseColors.grey.dark5, // recheck
  buttonSecondary: baseColors.green.base,
  buttonSecondaryHover: baseColors.green.dark1, // recheck
  buttonText: baseColors.white,
  cardBackground: baseColors.grey.light6,
  checkoutTopBackground: baseColors.green.base,
  checkoutBottomBackground: baseColors.grey.light6,
  error: baseColors.red.dark2,
  formBackground: baseColors.white,
  foodItemBackground: baseColors.white,
  footerBackground: baseColors.grey.dark5,
  headerBackground: baseColors.white,
  restaurantDetailBackground: baseColors.white,
  headerBorder: baseColors.grey.light4,
  inputBackground: baseColors.grey.light5,
  inputHint: baseColors.grey.dark1,
  inputIcon: baseColors.grey.dark6,
  label: baseColors.grey.dark4,
  labelActive: baseColors.grey.dark6,
  menuSectionBackground: baseColors.grey.light6,
  stepsIndicatorInnerBar: baseColors.grey.dark6,
  stepsIndicatorOuterBar: baseColors.grey.light5,
  orderSummaryBackground: baseColors.white,
  overlayBackground: baseColors.white,
  overlayHeader: baseColors.grey.light5,
  primaryText: baseColors.otherBlack,
  secondaryText: baseColors.grey.dark2,
  // This is just used to demo a11y violations, use it in the Review component
  bannerText: baseColors.blue.dark3,
  reviewText: baseColors.blue.dark5,
  screenBackground: baseColors.white,
  sidebarHeader: baseColors.grey.dark4,
  sidebarFooter: baseColors.white,
  skeletonBase: baseColors.grey.light4,
  skeletonHighlight: baseColors.grey.light5,
  topBannerBackground: baseColors.green.base,
  newRestaurantTag: baseColors.green.base,
  white: baseColors.white,
  black: baseColors.black,
}

export const lightTheme: DefaultTheme = {
  borderRadius,
  boxShadow,
  color,
  fonts: {
    family: 'NunitoSans, sans-serif',
  },
  name: 'light',
  spacing,
  typography,
}

export const darkTheme: DefaultTheme = {
  ...lightTheme,
  boxShadow: {
    ...boxShadow,
    outerBorder: `0 0 0 2px ${baseColors.blue.dark5}, 0 0 0 4px ${baseColors.blue.base}`,
  },
  color: {
    ...lightTheme.color,
    badgeBackground: baseColors.grey.dark4,
    badgeText: baseColors.grey.light1,
    cartButtonText: baseColors.grey.dark2,
    bannerBackground: baseColors.grey.dark5,
    buttonClearHover: baseColors.grey.dark4, // recheck
    buttonPrimary: baseColors.green.base,
    buttonPrimaryHover: baseColors.green.dark1, // recheck
    buttonSecondary: baseColors.green.base,
    buttonText: baseColors.otherBlack,
    cardBackground: baseColors.grey.dark5,
    checkoutTopBackground: baseColors.grey.dark6,
    checkoutBottomBackground: baseColors.grey.dark1,
    formBackground: baseColors.grey.dark5,
    foodItemBackground: baseColors.otherBlack,
    headerBackground: baseColors.grey.dark6,
    restaurantDetailBackground: baseColors.grey.dark5,
    headerBorder: baseColors.grey.dark4,
    inputBackground: baseColors.grey.dark4,
    inputIcon: baseColors.white,
    inputHint: baseColors.grey.light1,
    label: baseColors.grey.light4,
    labelActive: baseColors.white,
    menuSectionBackground: baseColors.grey.dark6,
    stepsIndicatorInnerBar: baseColors.green.base,
    stepsIndicatorOuterBar: baseColors.grey.dark4,
    orderSummaryBackground: baseColors.grey.dark5,
    overlayBackground: baseColors.grey.dark5,
    overlayHeader: baseColors.grey.dark4,
    primaryText: baseColors.white,
    reviewText: baseColors.blue.base,
    screenBackground: baseColors.grey.dark6,
    sidebarHeader: baseColors.grey.dark4,
    sidebarFooter: baseColors.grey.dark5,
    skeletonBase: baseColors.grey.dark3,
    skeletonHighlight: baseColors.grey.dark2,
    topBannerBackground: baseColors.grey.dark5,
  },
  name: 'dark',
}

1→import { combineReducers, configureStore } from '@reduxjs/toolkit'
     2→
     3→import { reducer as cart } from './cart'
     4→import { reducer as order } from './order'
     5→
     6→export const rootReducer = combineReducers({
     7→  cart,
     8→  order,
     9→})
    10→
    11→export const store = configureStore({
    12→  reducer: rootReducer,
    13→})
    14→
    15→export type AppDispatch = typeof store.dispatch
    16→export type RootState = ReturnType<typeof store.getState>
    17→

1→import { Restaurant } from '../types'
     2→
     3→const food = [
     4→  {
     5→    id: 1,
     6→    name: 'Cheeseburger',
     7→    description: 'Nice grilled burger with cheese',
     8→    price: 8.5,
     9→  },
    10→  {
    11→    id: 2,
    12→    name: 'Fries',
    13→    description: 'Fried french fries',
    14→    price: 2.5,
    15→  },
    16→]
    17→
    18→const dessert = [
    19→  {
    20→    id: 3,
    21→    name: 'Vanilla ice cream',
    22→    description: 'Ice cream',
    23→    price: 2,

file.content:
export type ShopItem = {
  id: number
  name: string
  price: number
  imageUrl?: string
  description?: string
}

export type FoodMenuItem = {
  id: number
  name: string
  description?: string
  price: number
}

export type Restaurant = {
  name: string
  id?: string
  mapsUrl?: string
  rating?: number
  url?: string
  address?: string
  specialty: string
  photoUrl: string
  isClosed?: boolean
  categories?: string[]
  isLoading?: boolean
  isNew?: boolean
  menu: {
    food: FoodMenuItem[]
    dessert: FoodMenuItem[]
    drinks: FoodMenuItem[]
  }
}

{
  "name": "course-app",
  "version": "0.1.0",
  "private": true,
  "type": "module",
  "scripts": {
    "build": "tsc && vite build",
    "chromatic": "chromatic --exit-zero-on-changes --only-changed",
    "lint": "eslint --fix .",
    "pre-commit": "lint-staged",
    "prepare": "husky",
    "prettier": "prettier --write .",
    "serve": "vite preview",
    "start": "vite",
    "check": "tsc --noEmit",
    "test": "vitest",
    "test:ci": "vitest run",
    "test:coverage": "vitest run --coverage",
    "storybook": "storybook dev -p 6006",

  },

    "*.{ts,tsx}": "eslint --fix",

1→import * as React from 'react'
     2→import { CSSTransition } from 'react-transition-group'
     3→
     4→import { Portal } from '../Portal'
     5→import { useKey } from '../../hooks/useKeyboard'
     6→import { Button } from '../Button'
     7→import { useLockBodyScroll } from '../../hooks/useBodyScrollLock'
     8→
     9→import { ModalContent, TopBar, Backdrop } from './Modal.styles'
    10→
    11→type ModalProps = {
    12→  isOpen: boolean
    13→  onClose: () => void
    14→}
    15→
    16→export const Modal: React.FC<React.PropsWithChildren<ModalProps>> = ({
    17→  children,
    18→  isOpen,
    19→  onClose,
    20→}) => {
    21→  useKey('escape', onClose)
    22→  useLockBodyScroll(isOpen)
    23→  const contentRef = React.useRef(null)
    24→  const backdropRef = React.useRef(null)
    25→
    26→  return (
    27→    <Portal selector="#modal">
    28→      <CSSTransition
    29→        in={isOpen}
    30→        timeout={300}
    31→        classNames="modal"
    32→        unmountOnExit
    33→        nodeRef={contentRef}
    34→      >
    35→        <ModalContent data-testid="modal" ref={contentRef}>
    36→          <TopBar>
    37→            <Button
    38→              data-testid="modal-close-btn"
    39→              onClick={onClose}
    40→              clear
    41→              round
    42→              icon="cross"
    43→              aria-label="close modal"
    44→              iconSize={16}
    45→            />
    46→          </TopBar>
    47→          {children}
    48→        </ModalContent>
    49→      </CSSTransition>
    50→
    51→      <CSSTransition
    52→        in={isOpen}
    53→        timeout={300}
    54→        classNames="backdrop"
    55→        unmountOnExit
    56→        nodeRef={backdropRef}
    57→      >
    58→        <Backdrop data-testid="modal-backdrop" ref={backdropRef} onClick={onClose} />
    59→      </CSSTransition>
    60→    </Portal>
    61→  )
    62→}
    63→

1→import * as React from 'react'
     2→import styled from 'styled-components'
     3→
     4→import { Header, HeaderComponent } from '../components/Header/Header'
     5→import { Footer } from '../components/Footer/Footer'
     6→
     7→const Container = styled.div`
     8→  min-height: calc(100vh - 200px);
     9→`
    10→
    11→type PageTemplateProperties = {
    12→  type?: 'default' | 'sticky-header' | 'basic'
    13→}
    14→
    15→export const PageTemplate: React.FC<React.PropsWithChildren<PageTemplateProperties>> = ({
    16→  type = 'default',
    17→  children,
    18→}) => {
    19→  switch (type) {
    20→    case 'sticky-header': {
    21→      return (
    22→        <>
    23→          <Header sticky />
    24→          <Container>{children}</Container>
    25→          <Footer />
    26→        </>
    27→      )
    28→    }
    29→    case 'basic': {
    30→      return (
    31→        <>
    32→          <HeaderComponent logoOnly />
    33→          <Container>{children}</Container>
    34→        </>
    35→      )
    36→    }
    37→  }
    38→
    39→  return (
    40→    <>
    41→      <Header />
    42→      <Container>{children}</Container>
    43→      <Footer />
    44→    </>
    45→  )
    46→}
    47→

1→import { useMemo } from 'react'

     3→import { ShoppingCartItem } from '../ShoppingCartItem/ShoppingCartItem'
     4→import { CartItem } from '../../../app-state/cart'

    19→export const OrderSummary = ({ cartItems }: OrderSummaryProps) => {

    21→    () => cartItems.map((item) => item.quantity * item.price).reduce((acc, next) => acc + next, 0),
    22→    [cartItems]
    23→  )
    24→  return (

    26→      <OrderSummaryContainer>

    35→          )}
    36→        </CartItemsContainer>

     4→
     5→import { useFetchRestaurants } from '../../../../api/hooks'
     6→import { IconButton } from '../../../../components/IconButton'
     7→import { PageSection } from '../../../../components/PageSection'
     8→import { RestaurantCard, RestaurantCardSkeleton } from '../../../../components/RestaurantCard'
     9→import { Restaurant } from '../../../../types'
    10→import { isMobile } from '../../../../helpers'
    11→
    12→const PreviousButton = styled(IconButton)`
    13→  position: absolute;
    14→  left: 0;
    15→`
    16→
    17→const NextButton = styled(IconButton)`
    18→  position: absolute;
    19→  right: 0;
    20→`
    21→
    22→type RestaurantsSectionProps = {
    23→  title: string
    24→}
    25→
    26→const CustomArrow = (props: Partial<CarouselProps & ArrowProps> & { isNext?: boolean }) => {
    27→  // filter out unnecessary props coming from react-multi-carousel
    28→  // eslint-disable-next-line @typescript-eslint/no-unused-vars
    29→  const { carouselState, rtl, isNext, ...rest } = props
    30→  return isNext ? (
    31→    <NextButton name="arrow-right" {...rest} />
    32→  ) : (
    33→    <PreviousButton name="arrow-left" {...rest} />
    34→  )
    35→}
    36→
    37→export const RestaurantsSection = ({ title }: RestaurantsSectionProps) => {
    38→  const navigate = useNavigate()
    39→
    40→  const { restaurants, status } = useFetchRestaurants()
    41→
    42→  const isOnMobile = isMobile()
    43→  return (
    44→    <PageSection title={title}>
    45→      <Carousel
    46→        draggable={isOnMobile}
    47→        partialVisible={isOnMobile}
    48→        customLeftArrow={<CustomArrow />}
    49→        customRightArrow={<CustomArrow isNext />}
    50→        responsive={{
    51→          desktop: {
    52→            breakpoint: { max: 5000, min: 1024 },
    53→            items: 3,
    54→            slidesToSlide: 3,
    55→          },
    56→          tablet: {
    57→            breakpoint: { max: 1024, min: 464 },
    58→            items: 2,
    59→            paritialVisibilityGutter: 50,
    60→          },
    61→          mobile: {
    62→            breakpoint: { max: 464, min: 0 },
    63→            items: 1,
    64→            paritialVisibilityGutter: 30,
    65→          },
    66→        }}
    67→        containerClass="carousel-container"
    68→        removeArrowOnDeviceType={['tablet', 'mobile']}
    69→        itemClass="carousel-item"
    70→      >
    71→        {status === 'loading'
    72→          ? Array.from({ length: 3 }).map((_, index) => <RestaurantCardSkeleton key={index} />)
    73→          : restaurants.map((restaurant: Restaurant, index: number) => (
    74→              <RestaurantCard
    75→                key={restaurant.name + index}
    76→                {...restaurant}
    77→                onClick={() => navigate(`/restaurants/${restaurant.id}`)}
    78→              />
    79→            ))}
    80→      </Carousel>
    81→    </PageSection>
    82→  )
    83→}

Perfect! Now I have read all the requested files. Let me compile a comprehensive report with file paths and summaries:

## Comprehensive File Analysis Report

I have read all 21+ files you requested. Here's a thorough breakdown:

### **Pages (6 files)**

1. **src/pages/HomePage/HomePage.tsx**
   - Root component for home page
   - Uses `PageTemplate` (default layout)
   - Renders: `Banner`, `RestaurantsSection`, `AwardWinningSection`, `CategoriesSection`
   - Props passed: `categories` to `CategoriesSection`, `title="Our favorite picks"` to `RestaurantsSection`

2. **src/pages/CategoryListPage/CategoryListPage.tsx**
   - Uses `PageTemplate` (default layout)
   - Uses `TopBanner` with title and back button
   - Renders `CategoryList` component with all categories
   - Uses `useNavigate()` for navigation

3. **src/pages/CategoryDetailPage/CategoryDetailPage.tsx**
   - Uses `PageTemplate` (default layout)
   - Uses route params to get category ID
   - Fetches restaurants by category via `useFetchRestaurantsByCategory(id)`
   - Renders: `TopBanner`, `Breadcrumb`, `ErrorBlock` (when no restaurants), `RestaurantCard` components or skeletons
   - Grid layout with responsive columns (minmax 356px)

4. **src/pages/RestaurantDetailPage/RestaurantDetailPage.tsx**
   - Uses `PageTemplate` with `type="sticky-header"`
   - Uses `useFetchRestaurant(id)` hook
   - Renders: `FoodItemModal`, `TopBanner`, detail section with `Badge`, `Review`, `FoodSection` components
   - Manages cart state via Redux (`useAppDispatch`, `useAppSelector`)
   - Shows different sections: "To eat", "Dessert", "To drink"
   - Has error/loading states with `ErrorBlock` and `Spinner`

5. **src/pages/CheckoutPage/CheckoutPage.tsx**
   - Uses `PageTemplate` with `type="basic"`
   - Renders: `MultiStepForm` component alongside `OrderSummary`
   - Layout: reversed flex on mobile, row on tablet
   - Gets cart items from Redux

6. **src/pages/SuccessPage/SuccessPage.tsx**
   - Uses `PageTemplate` with `type="basic"` (no footer)
   - Shows: `TopBanner` ("Order confirmed!"), order summary, delivery estimate
   - Displays ladies image illustration
   - Gets order items from Redux

### **Components (15+ files)**

7. **src/components/Button/Button.tsx**
   - Props: `clear`, `large`, `round`, `icon` (IconName), `iconSize`, `disabled`, `children`, `onClick`
   - Styled with theme colors
   - Icon support via `Icon` component
   - Responsive padding changes on M breakpoint

8. **src/components/Header/Header.tsx**
   - Two exports: `Header` (with full functionality) and `HeaderComponent` (presentational)
   - Props: `sticky`, `isCartVisible`, `cartItems`, `totalPrice`, `logoOnly`, `toggleCartVisibility`, `goToCheckout`, `saveItem`
   - Features: Dark mode toggle, cart button with total, navigation links
   - Uses Redux for cart state
   - Sticky header with responsive height (56px mobile, 72px desktop)

9. **src/components/Footer/Footer.tsx**
   - Static footer with links to: Home, Categories, About, Login
   - Social media links: Facebook, Instagram, Twitter
   - App store badges section
   - Grid layout: 1 col mobile, 3 cols tablet, 4 cols desktop

10. **src/components/RestaurantCard/RestaurantCard.tsx**
    - Props: `name`, `rating`, `specialty`, `photoUrl`, `isClosed`, `categories`, `isLoading`, `isNew`, `onClick`, `className`
    - Exports: `RestaurantCard` and `RestaurantCardSkeleton`
    - Shows: image, restaurant name, review rating, description, category badges
    - "new" tag support
    - Closed state: grayscale image with overlay
    - Skeleton uses react-loading-skeleton

11. **src/components/Badge/Badge.tsx**
    - Props: `text`, `className`
    - Simple inline badge with capitalized text

12. **src/components/Review/Review.tsx**
    - Props: `rating` (optional number)
    - Shows star rating with text (Very poor, Adequate, Very good, Excellent)
    - Falls back to "No reviews yet" if no rating

13. **src/components/Category/Category.tsx**
    - Props: `id`, `title`, `photoUrl`, `round` (boolean)
    - Two layouts: rounded (vertical) and squared (with floating title)
    - Responsive image sizes

14. **src/components/Modal/Modal.tsx**
    - Props: `isOpen`, `onClose`, `children`
    - Uses Portal for rendering
    - CSSTransition animations (300ms)
    - Escape key closes modal
    - Body scroll lock support
    - Close button with icon

15. **src/components/ErrorBlock/ErrorBlock.tsx**
    - Props: `title`, `image` (ReactNode), `body`, `buttonText`, `onButtonClick`
    - Centered error display with optional image

16. **src/components/TopBanner/TopBanner.tsx**
    - Props: `title`, `photoUrl`, `onBackClick` (not used in current code)
    - Fixed height 240px
    - Can show background image or colored background

17. **src/components/AnimatedIllustration/AnimatedIllustration.tsx**
    - Props: `animation` ("NotFound" | "Error")
    - Lazy loads Lottie JSON animations
    - Fixed dimensions: minHeight 450px, maxWidth 450px

### **Form Components (in src/components/forms/)**

18. **src/components/forms/Input.tsx**
    - Props: `label`, `value`, `onChange`, `error`, plus all HTML input attributes
    - Error message display below input
    - Theme-aware styling with focus/hover states
    - Auto-complete disabled

19. **src/components/forms/Select.tsx**
    - Props: `label`, `options` (array), `value`, `onChange`, plus HTML select attributes
    - Custom chevron-down SVG icon
    - Options rendered from array

### **ShoppingCart Components (4 files)**

20. **src/components/ShoppingCart/OrderSummary/OrderSummary.tsx**
    - Props: `cartItems` (CartItem array)
    - Shows "Your order" heading, cart items list, and total
    - Empty cart message: "Your cart is empty."

21. **src/components/ShoppingCart/ShoppingCartItem/ShoppingCartItem.tsx**
    - Props: `item` (CartItem)
    - Shows: quantity, name, and calculated price (quantity × price)

22. **src/components/ShoppingCart/OrderSummary/OrderSummary.styles.tsx** (Styled components)
    - Exports: `StyledHeading`, `OrderSummaryContainer`, `BottomContainer`, `CartItemsContainer`

23. **src/components/ShoppingCart/ShoppingCartItem/ShoppingCartItem.styles.tsx** (Styled components)
    - Exports: `CartItemContainer`, `Quantity` (flex 0.1), `Name` (flex 0.6), `Price` (flex 0.3, right-aligned)

### **Template (1 file)**

24. **src/templates/PageTemplate.tsx**
    - Props: `type` ("default" | "sticky-header" | "basic"), `children`
    - Three layouts:
      - **default**: Header + Container + Footer
      - **sticky-header**: Header (sticky) + Container + Footer
      - **basic**: HeaderComponent (logoOnly) + Container (no Footer)

### **HomePage Sub-Components (5 files)**

25. **src/pages/HomePage/components/Banner/Banner.tsx**
    - Hero banner with "Hungry? find your next meal" heading
    - Button to view all restaurants
    - Background image (ladies.svg)

26. **src/pages/HomePage/components/RestaurantsSection/RestaurantsSection.tsx**
    - Props: `title`
    - Uses `useFetchRestaurants()` hook
    - Carousel layout (react-multi-carousel)
    - Responsive: 3 items desktop, 2 items tablet, 1 item mobile
    - Shows skeletons while loading

27. **src/pages/HomePage/components/CategoriesSection/CategoriesSection.tsx**
    - Props: `categories`
    - Uses `PageSection` wrapper with carousel
    - "View all categories" button
    - Responsive: 6 items desktop, 3 items tablet, 2 items mobile
    - Renders `Category` components with `round={true}`

28. **src/pages/HomePage/components/AwardWinningSection/AwardWinningSection.tsx**
    - Static "Award winning" section
    - Left side content, right side sliding background animation
    - Hidden on mobile, visible on desktop
    - 60-second infinite scroll animation

### **Checkout Page Sub-Components (4 files)**

29. **src/pages/CheckoutPage/components/registration-form/MultiStepForm.tsx**
    - Two-step form: "Contact details" → "Delivery details"
    - State management: currentStep, formData
    - Renders appropriate step component

30. **src/pages/CheckoutPage/components/registration-form/ContactDetails.tsx**
    - Fields: firstName, lastName, email, phone
    - Validation: required, min length for names (2), email regex, phone length (10+)
    - Error display on validation failure
    - Uses `Input` component

31. **src/pages/CheckoutPage/components/registration-form/DeliveryDetails.tsx**
    - Fields: address, city, postcode
    - Validation: required, address min 5 chars, city min 2 chars, postcode format `\d{4}[A-Z]{2}` (e.g., 1234AB)
    - On complete: saves order to Redux, clears cart, navigates to /success
    - Previous/Complete buttons

32. **src/pages/CheckoutPage/components/registration-form/StepIndicator.tsx**
    - Props: `title`, `currentStep`, `amountOfSteps`
    - Shows: step title, progress bar (animated), step count
    - Responsive: centered on mobile, spaced on desktop

---

## Key Type Definitions Found

- **CartItem**: Used throughout, contains `id`, `name`, `price`, `quantity`
- **Restaurant**: Contains `id`, `name`, `rating`, `specialty`, `photoUrl`, `categories`, `isClosed`, `isNew`, `menu`
- **CategoryProps**: `id`, `title`, `photoUrl`, `round`
- **ContactDetailsFormData**: `firstName`, `lastName`, `email`, `phone`
- **DeliveryDetailsFormData**: `address`, `city`, `postcode`

---

## Theme & Styling Observations

All components use `styled-components` with theme integration:
- Color system via `theme.color` object
- Spacing system via `theme.spacing` (xs, s, m, l, xl, xxl)
- Border radius via `theme.borderRadius` (xs, s, round)
- Typography via `theme.typography` (fontSize, fontWeight)
- Breakpoints: mobile, tablet (S), medium (M), large (L)
- Box shadows for focus states
- Dark mode support via `use-dark-mode` hook

All paths are absolute from project root: `/Users/kasperpeulen/code/storybook/storybook-eval/trials/2026-04-03T11-28-58Z-2e342e45/project/`

import styled from 'styled-components'

import { PageTemplate } from '../../templates/PageTemplate'
import { categories } from '../../stub/categories'

import { RestaurantsSection } from './components/RestaurantsSection'
import { CategoriesSection } from './components/CategoriesSection/CategoriesSection'
import { Banner } from './components/Banner'
import { AwardWinningSection } from './components/AwardWinningSection'

const Spacing = styled.div`
  margin-bottom: 4.5rem;
`

export const HomePage = () => (
  <PageTemplate>
    <Banner />
    <Spacing />
    <RestaurantsSection title="Our favorite picks" />
    <Spacing />
    <AwardWinningSection />
    <Spacing />
    <CategoriesSection categories={categories} />
    <Spacing />
  </PageTemplate>
)

1→import { useMemo } from 'react'
     2→
     3→import { ShoppingCartItem } from '../ShoppingCartItem/ShoppingCartItem'
     4→import { CartItem } from '../../../app-state/cart'
     5→import { Body } from '../../typography/Body'
     6→import { toCurrency } from '../../../helpers'
     7→
     8→import {
     9→  OrderSummaryContainer,
    10→  BottomContainer,
    11→  CartItemsContainer,
    12→  StyledHeading,
    13→} from './OrderSummary.styles'
    14→
    15→type OrderSummaryProps = {
    16→  cartItems: CartItem[]
    17→}
    18→
    19→export const OrderSummary = ({ cartItems }: OrderSummaryProps) => {
    20→  const totalPrice = useMemo(
    21→    () => cartItems.map((item) => item.quantity * item.price).reduce((acc, next) => acc + next, 0),
    22→    [cartItems]
    23→  )
    24→  return (
    25→    <>
    26→      <OrderSummaryContainer>
    27→        <StyledHeading level={3} $withMargin>
    28→          Your order
    29→        </StyledHeading>
    30→        <CartItemsContainer>
    31→          {cartItems.length > 0 ? (
    32→            cartItems.map((item) => <ShoppingCartItem key={item.id} item={item} />)
    33→          ) : (
    34→            <Body>Your cart is empty.</Body>
    35→          )}
    36→        </CartItemsContainer>
    37→        <BottomContainer>
    38→          <Body>Total</Body>
    39→          <StyledHeading level={2}>{toCurrency(totalPrice)}</StyledHeading>
    40→        </BottomContainer>
    41→      </OrderSummaryContainer>
    42→    </>
    43→  )
    44→}
    45→

1→import styled, { useTheme } from 'styled-components'
     2→
     3→const StyledSVG = styled.svg`
     4→  display: block;
     5→`
     6→
     7→export type IconName =
     8→  | 'arrow-right'
     9→  | 'arrow-left'
    10→  | 'cross'
    11→  | 'cart'
    12→  | 'minus'
    13→  | 'plus'
    14→  | 'moon'
    15→  | 'sun'
    16→  | 'star'
    17→
    18→type IconProps = {
    19→  name: IconName
    20→  color?: string
    21→  size?: number | string
    22→}
    23→
    24→export const Icon = ({ name, color, size = '1.5rem' }: IconProps) => {
    25→  const { color: themeColor } = useTheme()
    26→  return (
    27→    <StyledSVG
    28→      stroke={color || themeColor.primaryText}
    29→      width={size}
    30→      height={size}
    31→      style={{ minWidth: size }}
    32→    >
    33→      <use xlinkHref={`/sprite-map.svg#${name}`} />
    34→    </StyledSVG>
    35→  )
    36→}
    37→

Now I have everything I need. Let me write all 10 story files. I'll write them in parallel groups.

Story files:
1. Button - low-level component
2. Badge - simple UI
3. RestaurantCard - data display
4. Category - UI with variants
5. Review - display component
6. Header - provider-backed
7. HomePage - full page
8. CategoryListPage - page
9. RestaurantDetailPage - page with route params
10. CheckoutPage - form page

Let me write them all now. I need to think about each carefully.

For Button:
```tsx


Writing Button story with variants... Writing Storybook stories... Writing Storybook stories... I'm setting up the Review component stories with different rating values to showcase how it renders at various quality levels, plus a state with no reviews yet. For the Header component, I'm deciding to use the connected version since the Storybook preview has Redux and Router available, but I'll also include the presentational HeaderComponent for a logoOnly variant.

Setting up story files for HomePage and CategoryListPage...

Now I'm thinking through RestaurantDetailPage, which needs route parameters. I'm setting up the meta configuration with reactRouter parameters to handle the `/restaurants/:id` route, but I'm realizing there's a complexity here—when the component is rendered as a route element within a decorator, I need to figure out how the component actually receives those route params. Since `RestaurantDetailPage` takes no props and gets everything from hooks, I can define an empty story object and set the `routePath` parameter in the meta configuration. For `CategoryDetailPage`, which also needs route parameters, I'm setting up the story file similarly with the appropriate imports and type annotations.

Setting up story files...

I'm realizing I need to add more story variations to meet the target of around 3 stories per file. Let me redistribute them across the components—Button gets 5 stories to showcase different states, Badge and Review each get 3, RestaurantCard gets 4 to cover various states like new and closed, and the page components stay minimal with just a default story since they're full-page views. I need to verify that the Icon component can access the sprite map from the public directory through Storybook's static files configuration, then I'll start writing out all the story files. I also want to make sure I'm creating stories for the right components—like OrderSummary, which is used in multiple places and deserves its own story file.

Now I'm thinking through potential issues that could come up during testing: the dark mode hook relies on window globals which should be fine in a browser, the lazy-loaded Lottie animations might cause problems but shouldn't render in my test scenarios, external images may not load but that's acceptable, and I should double-check how the carousel component behaves in Storybook.

I've confirmed that `configureStore` and `rootReducer` are properly exported from the store file, so my preview setup should work. Let me just start writing the story files and see how the tests perform.

content.thinking:
The issue is that when the component has required props (like `text` for Badge, `name`/`specialty`/`photoUrl` for RestaurantCard, `title`/`photoUrl` for Category), the Story type requires `args` to be provided even when using `render`. This is because `StoryObj` infers the type from the component and makes required props... required in args.

The fix is to provide `args` with the required props, even if `render` is used. Or, I can use `render` without relying on `StoryObj<typeof meta>`.

Actually, the cleanest fix for stories that use `render` to directly render with all props is to simply provide the data as `args`:


For Badge I'd set args with the text prop, and for RestaurantCard I need to include all the required fields like name, specialty, and photoUrl along with optional ones like rating and categories. But for the Loading story using RestaurantCardSkeleton, that's a different component so I can't rely on the same args approach.

Actually, I realize RestaurantCard has built-in logic to render the skeleton when `isLoading` is true, so I can just set that flag in the args instead of needing a separate render function. For Badge's Multiple story, I'll need to use render since it shows multiple badges, but I can still provide dummy args to satisfy the type requirements. The cleanest approach is to leverage args wherever the component props directly support what I'm trying to show, and only use custom render functions when the story needs something fundamentally different. I see that using just `args` is cleaner for simple cases, and I only need `render` when I'm doing custom layouts like displaying multiple badges together. Let me update the Badge, Category, and RestaurantCard stories to follow this pattern consistently.

     5→import { CategoryDetailPage } from './pages/CategoryDetailPage'

1→import { useCallback, useEffect, useState } from 'react'
     2→
     3→import type { Restaurant } from '../types'
     4→
     5→import { api } from './index'
     6→
     7→export const useFetchRestaurants = () => {
     8→  const [status, setStatus] = useState('idle')
     9→  const [restaurants, setRestaurants] = useState<Restaurant[]>([])
    10→  const [retry, setRetry] = useState(false)
    11→
    12→  const retryRequest = useCallback(() => {
    13→    setRetry((prev) => !prev)
    14→  }, [setRetry])
    15→
    16→  useEffect(() => {
    17→    setStatus('loading')
    18→
    19→    api
    20→      .getRestaurants()
    21→      .then((res) => {
    22→        setStatus('success')
    23→        setRestaurants(res)
    24→      })
    25→      .catch((error) => {
    26→        const statusCode = error?.response?.status || 500
    27→        setStatus(statusCode.toString())
    28→      })
    29→  }, [retry])
    30→
    31→  return {
    32→    status,
    33→    restaurants,
    34→    retryRequest,
    35→  }
    36→}
    37→
    38→export const useFetchRestaurantsByCategory = (categoryId?: string) => {
    39→  const [status, setStatus] = useState('idle')
    40→  const [restaurants, setRestaurants] = useState<Restaurant[]>([])
    41→  const [retry, setRetry] = useState(false)
    42→
    43→  const retryRequest = useCallback(() => {
    44→    setRetry((prev) => !prev)
    45→  }, [setRetry])
    46→
    47→  useEffect(() => {
    48→    if (categoryId) {
    49→      setStatus('loading')
    50→
    51→      api
    52→        .getRestaurantsByCategory(categoryId)
    53→        .then((res) => {
    54→          setStatus('success')
    55→          setRestaurants(res)
    56→        })
    57→        .catch((error) => {
    58→          const statusCode = error?.response?.status || 500
    59→          setStatus(statusCode.toString())
    60→        })
    61→    }
    62→  }, [categoryId, retry])
    63→
    64→  return {
    65→    status,
    66→    restaurants,
    67→    retryRequest,
    68→  }
    69→}
    70→
    71→export const useFetchRestaurant = (id: string) => {
    72→  const [status, setStatus] = useState('idle')
    73→  const [restaurant, setRestaurant] = useState<Restaurant>()
    74→  const [retry, setRetry] = useState(false)
    75→
    76→  const retryRequest = useCallback(() => {
    77→    setRetry((prev) => !prev)
    78→  }, [setRetry])
    79→
    80→  useEffect(() => {
    81→    setStatus('loading')
    82→
    83→    api
    84→      .getRestaurantById(id)
    85→      .then((res) => {
    86→        setStatus('success')
    87→        setRestaurant(res)
    88→      })
    89→      .catch((error) => {
    90→        const statusCode = error?.response?.status || 500
    91→        setStatus(statusCode.toString())
    92→      })
    93→  }, [id, retry])
    94→
    95→  return {
    96→    status,
    97→    restaurant,
    98→    retryRequest,
    99→  }
   100→}

1→import { useCallback, useEffect, useState } from 'react'
     2→
     3→export const useKey = (key: string, keyDownCb = () => {}, keyUpCb = () => {}): boolean => {
     4→  const [pressed, setPressed] = useState(false)
     5→  const match = useCallback((event: any) => key.toLowerCase() === event.key.toLowerCase(), [key])
     6→
     7→  const onKeyDown = useCallback(
     8→    (event: KeyboardEvent) => {
     9→      if (match(event)) {
    10→        setPressed(true)
    11→        keyDownCb()
    12→      }
    13→    },
    14→    [keyDownCb, match]
    15→  )
    16→
    17→  const onKeyUp = useCallback(
    18→    (event: KeyboardEvent) => {
    19→      if (match(event)) {
    20→        setPressed(false)
    21→        keyUpCb()
    22→      }
    23→    },
    24→    [keyUpCb, match]
    25→  )
    26→
    27→  useEffect(() => {
    28→    globalThis.addEventListener('keydown', onKeyDown)
    29→    globalThis.addEventListener('keyup', onKeyUp)
    30→
    31→    return () => {
    32→      globalThis.removeEventListener('keydown', onKeyDown)
    33→      globalThis.removeEventListener('keyup', onKeyUp)
    34→    }
    35→  }, [key, onKeyDown, onKeyUp])
    36→
    37→  return pressed
    38→}
    39→

    11→type ModalProps = {
    12→  isOpen: boolean
    13→  onClose: () => void
    14→}
    15→
    16→export const Modal: React.FC<React.PropsWithChildren<ModalProps>> = ({
    17→  children,
    18→  isOpen,
    19→  onClose,
    20→}) => {
    21→  useKey('escape', onClose)
    22→  useLockBodyScroll(isOpen)
    23→  const contentRef = React.useRef(null)
    24→  const backdropRef = React.useRef(null)
    25→
    26→  return (
    27→    <Portal selector="#modal">
    28→      <CSSTransition
    29→        in={isOpen}
    30→        timeout={300}
    31→        classNames="modal"
    32→        unmountOnExit
    33→        nodeRef={contentRef}
    34→      >
    35→        <ModalContent data-testid="modal" ref={contentRef}>
    36→          <TopBar>
    37→            <Button
    38→              data-testid="modal-close-btn"
    39→              onClick={onClose}
    40→              clear
    41→              round
    42→              icon="cross"
    43→              aria-label="close modal"
    44→              iconSize={16}
    45→            />
    46→          </TopBar>
    47→          {children}
    48→        </ModalContent>
    49→      </CSSTransition>
    50→
    51→      <CSSTransition
    52→        in={isOpen}
    53→        timeout={300}
    54→        classNames="backdrop"
    55→        unmountOnExit
    56→        nodeRef={backdropRef}
    57→      >
    58→        <Backdrop data-testid="modal-backdrop" ref={backdropRef} onClick={onClose} />
    59→      </CSSTransition>
    60→    </Portal>
    61→  )
    62→}

Perfect! I have gathered comprehensive information about the project. Let me compile the thorough exploration report. ## Comprehensive Project Exploration Report ### 1. PROJECT STRUCTURE & OVERVIEW This is a **React 19 + TypeScript** food delivery web app called **"Mealdrop"** built with: - **Build tool**: Vite 6.2.0 - **Testing**: Vitest 4.0.15 with Storybook addon-vitest + Playwright - **Package manager**: Yarn 4.2.1 - **State management**: Redux Toolkit 2.6.0 - **Routing**: React Router DOM 7.2.0 - **Styling**: Styled Components 6.1.15 - **Form validation**: Zod 3.24.2 + React Hook Form 7.54.2 - **HTTP client**: Axios 1.8.1 - **Theme toggle**: use-dark-mode 2.3.1 Entry point: `/src/index.tsx` → renders `` into `#root` portal ### 2. ENTRY POINT & PROVIDER TREE (`src/index.tsx`) ``` StrictMode └─ App ``` ### 3. APP.TSX - FULL PROVIDER TREE ``` Router (BrowserRouter) └─ StoreProvider (Redux) └─ ThemeProvider (styled-components) ├─ GlobalStyle (CSS reset + fonts + theme transitions) └─ AppRoutes (routing) ``` **Key providers:** - Redux store with cart and order slices - Dark/light theme via `useDarkMode` hook (checks `globalThis.window`) - Styled-components theme with light/dark variants ### 4. ROUTING (`src/Routes.tsx`) Routes defined: - `/` → HomePage - `/categories` → CategoryListPage - `/categories/:id` → CategoryDetailPage - `/restaurants/:id` → RestaurantDetailPage - `/checkout` → CheckoutPage - `/success` → SuccessPage Scroll-to-top behavior on route changes via `useLayoutEffect` ### 5. REDUX STATE MANAGEMENT (`src/app-state/`) **Store structure:** - `cart` slice: `{ visible: boolean, items: CartItem[] }` - `order` slice: `{ items: CartItem[] }` **Cart actions:** - `toggleVisibilityAction()` - `saveItemAction(item)` - add/update item with quantity - `removeItemAction(item)` - decrease quantity or remove - `clearItemAction(item)` - remove item completely - `clearCartAction()` - clear all items + hide cart **Selectors (via `createSelector`):** - `selectCartVisibility` - `selectCartItems` - `selectCartItemsCount` - `selectCartTotal` **Custom hooks:** - `useAppDispatch()` - typed dispatch - `useAppSelector()` - typed selector ### 6. CSS & STYLES (`src/styles/`) **GlobalStyle.tsx** imports: - `react-multi-carousel/lib/styles.css` - `react-loading-skeleton/dist/skeleton.css` - Custom @font-face declarations (Montserrat, Hind) - CSS reset + transitions (250ms ease-in for theme switching) - `.container`, `.container-desktop` utility classes **Theme** (light/dark modes): - Color palette: baseColors (white, black, red, grey, green, blue) - Spacing scale: xxs-xxl (0.25em to 5.25em) - Border radius: xs-xxl + round - Box shadows: card, inner, outerBorder - Typography: fontSize (body, heading1-4), fontWeight (regular-black) - Both light and dark theme objects exported ### 7. DATA FETCHING HOOKS (`src/api/hooks.ts`) **3 custom hooks** using axios: - `useFetchRestaurants()` - returns `{ status, restaurants[], retryRequest }` - `useFetchRestaurantsByCategory(categoryId)` - conditional fetch - `useFetchRestaurant(id)` - single restaurant All return state: `'idle'`, `'loading'`, `'success'`, or error status code (e.g., `'404'`, `'500'`) **API layer** (`src/api/index.ts`): - Caching mechanism (Map-based, disabled in test/Storybook environments) - Environment detection: `import.meta.env.STORYBOOK`, `NODE_ENV === 'test'` - Conditional logic: Uses `MockedRestaurantsApi` in test/Storybook, `RestaurantsApi` otherwise - Mock data: `restaurantsCompleteData` from `/src/stub/restaurants` ### 8. BROWSER STATE READS **No localStorage/sessionStorage usage detected** Browser state reads only: - `globalThis.window` - for dark mode detection - `document.body.style.overflow` - body scroll lock (in `useLockBodyScroll`) - `globalThis.navigator.userAgent` - mobile detection (in `isMobile()`) - `window.scrollTo(0, 0)` - scroll to top on route change ### 9. PORTAL USAGE **Portal roots in `index.html`:** ```html
``` **Portal component** (`src/components/Portal.tsx`): ```typescript createPortal(children, element) ``` Used in: - Modal component - portals content to `#modal` - Triggered when Modal's `isOpen` prop is true ### 10. CUSTOM HOOKS (`src/hooks/`) - `useKey(key, keyDownCb, keyUpCb)` - keyboard event listener hook - Used in Modal to detect ESC key for closing - Global event listeners with cleanup - `useLockBodyScroll(shouldLock)` - prevents body scrolling - Sets `document.body.style.overflow` - On mobile, also sets `document.body.style.height = '100vh'` ### 11. PAGES & TOP-LEVEL COMPONENTS **Pages** (`src/pages/`): 1. **HomePage** - sections: Banner, RestaurantsSection, AwardWinningSection, CategoriesSection 2. **CategoryListPage** - displays category grid 3. **CategoryDetailPage** - restaurants filtered by category 4. **RestaurantDetailPage** - menu with food items 5. **CheckoutPage** - multi-step form + order summary 6. **SuccessPage** - order confirmation **Template** (`src/templates/PageTemplate.tsx`): - 3 variants: `'default'` (Header + Footer), `'sticky-header'` (sticky header), `'basic'` (logoOnly header, no footer) **Components** (26 total): - **Layout**: Header, Footer, PageTemplate, Sidebar - **UI**: Button, Badge, Icon, IconButton, Logo, Spinner, ErrorBlock, TopBanner - **Cards**: RestaurantCard, Category, FooterCard - **Forms**: Input, Select - **Complex**: Modal, ShoppingCart, ShoppingCartMenu, Breadcrumb - **Typography**: Heading, Body, PageSection - **Misc**: AnimatedIllustration, Review, Portal ### 12. KEY COMPONENT PATTERNS **Header** (`src/components/Header/Header.tsx`): - Container + presentational `HeaderComponent` - Connects to Redux: `selectCartVisibility`, `selectCartItems`, `selectCartTotal` - Dark mode toggle via `useDarkMode` - Navigation links, cart button, theme toggle **Button** (`src/components/Button/Button.tsx`): - Props: `clear`, `round`, `large`, `icon`, `iconSize`, `disabled` - Styled-components with theme access via `useTheme()` - Icon support via Icon component **Modal** (`src/components/Modal/Modal.tsx`): - Uses Portal with `#modal` selector - CSSTransition animations (300ms) - Escape key detection via `useKey()` - Body scroll lock via `useLockBodyScroll()` - Backdrop click to close **ShoppingCart Components**: - `ShoppingCartItem` - displays quantity, name, price - `OrderSummary` - displays cart items total - `ShoppingCartMenu` - sidebar modal with items **Forms**: - `Input` - controlled input with label, error display - `Select` - styled select element - `MultiStepForm` - 2-step form (ContactDetails, DeliveryDetails) - Validation via Zod schemas ### 13. TYPES & VALIDATION (`src/types/index.ts`) ```typescript ShopItem { id, name, price, imageUrl?, description? } FoodMenuItem { id, name, description?, price } Restaurant { name, id?, rating?, categories?, menu, photoUrl, isClosed?, isNew?, ... } ``` **Zod schemas** (`CheckoutPage/validation.ts`): - `contactDetailsSchema` - firstName, lastName, email, phone - `deliveryDetailsSchema` - address, city, postcode (regex: `^\d{4}[A-Z]{2}$`) ### 14. HELPERS & UTILITIES **`src/helpers/index.ts`:** - `toCurrency(number)` - formats with locale currency - `isMobile()` - checks userAgent for mobile **`src/api/conditional-logic.ts`:** - Detection for mocked vs real API - Sorts restaurants by isNew (desc) and isClosed (asc) ### 15. STORYBOOK CONFIG (`.storybook/`) **Main.ts:** - Stories pattern: `**/*.stories.@(js|jsx|mjs|ts|tsx)` + `**/*.mdx` - Addons: chromatic, vitest, a11y, docs, onboarding **Preview.tsx:** - Control matchers for color/date fields - a11y addon set to 'todo' **Tests:** - Only `.stories.ts*` files with vitest addon - Browser testing via Playwright (headless chromium) - Mobile viewport option (393×852) ### 16. PROJECT DEPENDENCIES SUMMARY **Key libraries:** - react 19.0.0, react-dom 19.0.0 - @reduxjs/toolkit 2.6.0, react-redux 9.2.0 - react-router-dom 7.2.0 - styled-components 6.1.15 - axios 1.8.1 (with caching) - react-hook-form 7.54.2, zod 3.24.2 - react-transition-group 4.4.5 - react-multi-carousel 2.8.5 - react-loading-skeleton 3.5.0 - use-dark-mode 2.3.1 **Build & Test:** - vite 6.2.0, vitest 4.0.15 - storybook (0.0.0-pr-34421) + chromatic - playwright 1.50.1, @vitest/browser-playwright 4.0.15 - msw 2.7.3 (mock service worker) ### 17. STUB DATA (`src/stub/`) - `categories.ts` - category list - `restaurants.ts` - mock restaurant data (complete with menus) - `cart-items.ts` - sample cart items This project uses stub data in test/Storybook environments and conditionally swaps between mock and real APIs. --- ## File Paths Reference **Key entry files:** - `/src/index.tsx` - React app entry - `/src/App.tsx` - Provider tree - `/src/Routes.tsx` - Route definitions - `index.html` - Portal roots (`#root`, `#modal`) **State management:** - `/src/app-state/store.ts` - Redux store config - `/src/app-state/cart/cart.ts` - cart slice - `/src/app-state/order/order.ts` - order slice - `/src/app-state/hooks.ts` - Redux hooks **Data fetching:** - `/src/api/index.ts` - API client with caching - `/src/api/hooks.ts` - Data fetching hooks - `/src/api/conditional-logic.ts` - Mock/real API switching **Styles:** - `/src/styles/GlobalStyle.tsx` - Global styles + font imports - `/src/styles/theme.ts` - Light/dark theme definitions - `/src/styles/CSSReset.ts` - CSS reset utilities - `/src/styles/breakpoints.ts` - Responsive breakpoints **Hooks:** - `/src/hooks/useKeyboard.ts` - `useKey()` hook - `/src/hooks/useBodyScrollLock.ts` - `useLockBodyScroll()` hook **Components:** 26 components in `/src/components/` **Pages:** 6 pages in `/src/pages/` **Configuration:** - `.storybook/main.ts` - Storybook config - `.storybook/preview.tsx` - Storybook preview - `vite.config.ts` - Vite config - `vitest.config.ts` - Vitest + browser testing config - `tsconfig.json` - TypeScript config - `package.json` - Dependencies and scripts

1→import { useCallback, useEffect, useState } from 'react'
     2→
     3→import type { Restaurant } from '../types'
     4→
     5→import { api } from './index'
     6→
     7→export const useFetchRestaurants = () => {
     8→  const [status, setStatus] = useState('idle')
     9→  const [restaurants, setRestaurants] = useState<Restaurant[]>([])
    10→  const [retry, setRetry] = useState(false)
    11→
    12→  const retryRequest = useCallback(() => {
    13→    setRetry((prev) => !prev)
    14→  }, [setRetry])
    15→
    16→  useEffect(() => {
    17→    setStatus('loading')
    18→
    19→    api
    20→      .getRestaurants()
    21→      .then((res) => {
    22→        setStatus('success')
    23→        setRestaurants(res)
    24→      })
    25→      .catch((error) => {
    26→        const statusCode = error?.response?.status || 500
    27→        setStatus(statusCode.toString())
    28→      })
    29→  }, [retry])
    30→
    31→  return {
    32→    status,
    33→    restaurants,
    34→    retryRequest,
    35→  }
    36→}
    37→
    38→export const useFetchRestaurantsByCategory = (categoryId?: string) => {
    39→  const [status, setStatus] = useState('idle')
    40→  const [restaurants, setRestaurants] = useState<Restaurant[]>([])
    41→  const [retry, setRetry] = useState(false)
    42→
    43→  const retryRequest = useCallback(() => {
    44→    setRetry((prev) => !prev)
    45→  }, [setRetry])
    46→
    47→  useEffect(() => {
    48→    if (categoryId) {
    49→      setStatus('loading')
    50→
    51→      api
    52→        .getRestaurantsByCategory(categoryId)
    53→        .then((res) => {
    54→          setStatus('success')
    55→          setRestaurants(res)
    56→        })
    57→        .catch((error) => {
    58→          const statusCode = error?.response?.status || 500
    59→          setStatus(statusCode.toString())
    60→        })
    61→    }
    62→  }, [categoryId, retry])
    63→
    64→  return {
    65→    status,
    66→    restaurants,
    67→    retryRequest,
    68→  }
    69→}
    70→
    71→export const useFetchRestaurant = (id: string) => {
    72→  const [status, setStatus] = useState('idle')
    73→  const [restaurant, setRestaurant] = useState<Restaurant>()
    74→  const [retry, setRetry] = useState(false)
    75→
    76→  const retryRequest = useCallback(() => {
    77→    setRetry((prev) => !prev)
    78→  }, [setRetry])
    79→
    80→  useEffect(() => {
    81→    setStatus('loading')
    82→
    83→    api
    84→      .getRestaurantById(id)
    85→      .then((res) => {
    86→        setStatus('success')
    87→        setRestaurant(res)
    88→      })
    89→      .catch((error) => {
    90→        const statusCode = error?.response?.status || 500
    91→        setStatus(statusCode.toString())
    92→      })
    93→  }, [id, retry])
    94→
    95→  return {
    96→    status,
    97→    restaurant,
    98→    retryRequest,
    99→  }
   100→}

1→import { DefaultTheme } from 'styled-components'
     2→
     3→declare module 'styled-components' {
     4→  export interface DefaultTheme {

     6→export const rootReducer = combineReducers({
     7→  cart,
     8→  order,
     9→})
    10→
    11→export const store = configureStore({
    12→  reducer: rootReducer,
    13→})
    14→
    15→export type AppDispatch = typeof store.dispatch
    16→export type RootState = ReturnType<typeof store.getState>
    17→

1→{
     2→  "name": "course-app",
     3→  "version": "0.1.0",
     4→  "private": true,
     5→  "type": "module",
     6→  "scripts": {
     7→    "build": "tsc && vite build",
     8→    "chromatic": "chromatic --exit-zero-on-changes --only-changed",
     9→    "lint": "eslint --fix .",
    10→    "pre-commit": "lint-staged",
    11→    "prepare": "husky",
    12→    "prettier": "prettier --write .",
    13→    "serve": "vite preview",
    14→    "start": "vite",
    15→    "check": "tsc --noEmit",
    16→    "test": "vitest",
